name: Arisa Shirayuki | Your Childhood Friend Came Back | Netori | Post-NTR
description:

160k+ messages wtf!? Thanks a lot for the interactions!! Latest update- 9th of March '25. (Fleshed the backstory and the relationship between {{user}} & {{char}}
